entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.5.post2
entry.content:
Added missing WoC building. Added Monogod buildings for Norsca that were failing to generate and clarified their names better. Fixed generation error with spheres mode if too many spheres generate and no sanities are enabled.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).

entry.title: Paper Mario The Thousand Year Door v0.10.0
entry.content: # Changelog - Disabled color syncing for Multiplayer.

entry.title: Paper Mario The Thousand Year Door v0.10.0
entry.content:
# Changelog - Fix some memory leaks related to Multiplayer. Will continue to monitor as bug are reported.
**Please report any crashes you run into with screenshots in either the discord or on github**

entry.title: Paper Mario The Thousand Year Door v0.10.0
entry.content:
# Changelog
## New Additions - New Feature: In-Game Multiplayer. If you are connected to an Archipelago room, you will see up to 16 players in the same room as you. Everything will sync up that you do including sounds and all animations/overworld moves. Other players can be hammered to stun them briefly. ## Note This requires a new setting to be enabled in dolphin to avoid any emulator pop-ups and warnings. This is outlined in the setup doc, however the client will attempt to enable it for you automatically if you boot the game with it disabled. This is not guarenteed to work if you are on linux or mac. If you do not let the client boot the game for you automatically, it will still update the setting for you as long as the client was opened before your game.
A large part of this update was backend stability focused, related to memory usage, since the last 2 updates have pushed the memory usage of the game to its limits, and causing multiple crashes randly due to this. This should be resolved, but this is a new system I am using unique to every TTYD mod ever created, so this is new untested territory. Everything seems good though, Ive tested as much as I can.
## Changes and Fixes - All variants of Mini-Yux now will not have their HP scaled - Goal should now properly play when a their last crystal star is a tattle - Many fixes for logic with tattlesanity and enemy randomizer enabled - Fix for chapter access rules being incorrect with blue pipe toggle disabled - Fix for logic for some locations in the later half of palace of shadow - Various other small logic fixes
It is now more important than ever with these new updates to report any bugs you experience either into the discord or on github. If you experience anything please do not hesitate to do so.

entry.title: Paper Mario The Thousand Year Door v0.10.2.post2
entry.content:
## Changelog - Expanded the games memory from 24MB to 64MB. This is a necessary step to maintain stability with the new Multiplayer update and Enemy Randomizer. - New yaml option: ConsoleMode. This is deliberately stated in the yaml that this should only ever be enabled if you intend to play solo on a console, and should not be enabled for any other reason. This will disable multiplayer functionality, and change some of the patches applied to the game. - New yaml option: Multiplayer. This is a toggle for all multiplayer features, it is on by default and if it is turned off you will not broadcast your location to other players or receive any positional data from them. - New yaml option: RemoteItems. A new toggle to enable remote item receiving, this is off by default. This is fully integrated with the multiplayer feature to sync all in-game objects and items on any given slot, this means that any amount of people can connect to the same slot and see live object updates and items be picked up. If you pick up a slot with locations checked already and connect for the first time all items from that slot will be received and their items will no longer appear in the multiworld. - The game will now attempt to auto-launch the game properly on mac and linux systems, and the client will also attempt to write the settings required for the game to run in the TTYD config file in dolphin on boot. - Max rendered player count bumped from 16 to 24. - Re-Enabled color syncing between players in Multiplayer.
# Note As of v0.10.2 a new setting is required in your dolphin emulator for the game to function. This must be enabled before the game can be launched. In Config > Advanced, "Enable Emulated Memory Size Override" must be checked, and the MEM1 slider must be set to 64MB. If this setting is not set the game will crash on boot.
## Fixes - Fix a logic error for Poshley heights that expected you to have access with a lot less items than were actually required. - Fix some animations not playing correctly in multiplayer.

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.6.0
entry.content:
## Installation
1. Download `dread.apworld` (below) and drop it into your Archipelago install's `custom_worlds/` directory. 2. Generate a multiworld using `Metroid Dread` as the game. 3. Launch the **Dread Client** from Archipelago's Launcher (or open a `.dreadap` file). The window includes an AP server address bar, a **"Dread"** tab (live status + log), and a top-bar **Switch-status pill** for pointing the client at your Switch or Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use `/dread_connect <ip>` in the command bar). 4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched RomFS — see the [first-time setup walkthrough](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/docs/first-time-setup.md) for the click-by-click guide.
See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md) for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).
## What's Changed * fix(logic): keep DoorLocks symbolic to prevent unbeatable door-rando seeds by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/124 * fix(door-rando): restore solvable seeds + door/DNA/hint options, progressive defaults by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/125 * Move dreadvania_python config to host.yaml (standard AP settings) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/127
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.13.3...v0.14.0

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.0.6
entry.content:
You must re-build sm64ex if you have an older version!
- Added Secret Stage Coinsanity option. - Added Freestanding 1-Up Shuffle option. - Easy Butterflies option will make the Butterfly 1-Up checks far less aggravating. - No Despawns option prevents coins or 1-Ups from despawning, and grants them to you if they fall in a ditch or lava. - Big Boo's Haunt - Climb is no longer placed in the item pool when shuffling per-level Climb items, because Big Boo's Haunt has no climbable objects. - Tweaked item and location names for consistency. - Universal Tracker will show locations that would have been in logic if you had turned off strict logic requirements, as "glitched locations." - Fixed a logic error with JRB coins (thanks Albrekka) - The game will no longer display text for received 1-Ups.

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.6.4
entry.content: - Universal Tracker yaml-less support

entry.title: Slime Rancher v0.3.1
entry.content: - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option `market_logic` - [ApWorld] Updated logic from spreadsheet - [Client] Failed to load Custom Assets now gets remembered to stop lag during gameplay - [Client] Fixed a bug that I thought I accounted for with DeathLink - [Client] Fixed a bug with location names containing , with the client being weird about it - [Client] Autosave ends traps (this is to prevent save errors) - [Client] Changed how the save error is prevented

entry.title: Sonic Adventure DX v1.2.1
entry.content:
## [v1.2.2 pre-release 3] - 2026-06-14
### Fixed:
- Fixed incorrect spawn points in the Egg Carrier when exiting a Chao Garden. - Fixed the jungle cart sometimes being invisible. - Fixed Tails' Casino to Hotel video clip being missing. - Fixed compatibility issues with the Extra Subtitles mod: - Item reactions no longer play in menus when Extra Subtitles is enabled, to avoid crashes. - Reactions no longer show subtitles when Extra Subtitles is enabled, to avoid duplicate subtitles. - Fixed Super Sonic from Kell's mod not unlocking with the Chaos Emeralds. - Traps can no longer be activated during demo mode. - Fixed Death Link being sent in Sky Chase.
### Added:
- Added a skip from Jungle to Final Egg Tower for Sonic, Tails, Knuckles, and Gamma in Expert (DC). - Sonic's Mission 1 is no longer blacklisted, it now requires the Police Pass or TP Ticket. - This also works in Emblem Gating mode with the corresponding emblem requirements. - Re-enabled Chao eggs for Emblem Gating. - The golden egg now takes into account both the Police Pass route and the Sewers with TP Ticket. - Similar to how it works with either Hotel Keys or Casino + Station + Shutter Keys. Applies to both gating types.
### Changed:
- Several logic changes for expert logic - Removed skips from logic that depended on other doors being open or closed. - The clips are still listed in the logic sheet, but they are no longer in logic.

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.0.7
entry.content:
No changes to the sm64ex build from 0.0.6
- Many logic fixes (thanks Aylalira)

entry.title: Grim Dawn v0.4.1.post2
entry.content: * Fixed summons and non-summon enemies from cross randomizing and potentially causing an infinite import loop that crashes the game.

entry.title: CrossCode v0.9.3
entry.content:
## Additions
* Added a new **Tips** system to display useful information on the pause screen (@CodeTriangle, #77). * These tips replace the Task HUD which is usually inaccurate in rando due to its overreliance on linear plot points. * Got a tip idea? Submit it to CodeTriangle on Discord.
## Changes to Dependencies
* Added a new dependency on CodeTriangle's [`tips-and-tricks`](https://github.com/CodeTriangle/cc-tips-and-tricks). * Removed marquee functionality and added a new dependency on CodeTriangle's [`marquee`](https://github.com/CodeTriangle/cc-marquee/).
## Fixes to Mod
* Fixed an issue where locations would appear to be checked multiple times when acquiring items from pedestals (@CodeTriangle, #79). * Circumvent a visual issue that arises when floor 3 of Grand Krys'kajo is skipped by fighting Son of the East immediately (@CodeTriangle, #80).
## Fixes to Logic
* Move the following **Botanics** locations (@CodeTriangle, #76): * **Omega Puff Plant** now requires access to either **Gaia's Garden West** or **Gaia's Garden East**. * **Alpha Virus Shroom** and **Beta Virus Shroom** now require access to **Gaia's Garden Infested**. * Remove the requirement on **Meteor Pass** for **Maroon Trailblazing** and add it to **Henry Trailblazing** (@CodeTriangle, #76)

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.5.4
entry.content:
Fixes provided by @eah1759
- Origins - Add "All Spare Change Collected" check - Fix "Fill all 4 Soul Boxes" check not working - Prevent softlock from "Music EE - Shepherd of Fire" check

entry.title: Cursed Words v0.2.0
entry.content:
## Information This archipelago implementation is in **early development** and is in public pre-release for testing, so may not be complete and/or may contain bugs that heavily disrupt the experience. It is not advised to include this in large multiworlds at this time, so only do so at your own risk and inform your host beforehand.
## Setup Guide Please visit the [Setup Guide](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/CursedWords-Archipelago#setup-guide) for instructions on how to install the mod client.
## Issue / Bug Reporting If you experience issues that are not already on the [known issues list](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/CursedWords-Archipelago/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen), please raise a new issue or post in the [Cursed Words Forum in the Archipelago Discord Server](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1499176806962692196)
## Release Notes This release provides the following updates: ### Client Fixes - Updated to work with game version `v4.12`

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.3.post2
entry.content:
[Setup Guide](https://github.com/theemeraldsword85/DELTARUNEAP/blob/main/worlds/deltarune/docs/setup_en.md) - [Q&A](https://github.com/theemeraldsword85/DELTARUNEAP/blob/main/worlds/deltarune/docs/en_DELTARUNE.md)
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
***WARNING: Switching from earlier version during an ASYNC will make the game forget that you already completed chapters (as the datastorage key changed)***
**Linux is not supported for now and will disconnect you after few seconds from the server! Linux will be supported in future updates**
**Starting a chapter with previous chapter completion data isn't recommended for right now as the rewrite wasn't made with it in mind. This will be fixed soon!**
**v2.0.3a HOTFIX: Trashcan in chapter 2 now correctly works**
# Changelog ## APWorld - Reworked the Regions internally ### Chapter 2 - Purchasing the ThornRing and FreezeRing now requires having Noelle in Logic - `CH2: Cyber City - Trash Can #1` Now requires having either Kris or Noelle ### Chapter 4 - Made the exit to the Second Sanctuary have Susie and Kris in logic
## Game - Internally, customflags are now more descriptive - Minor grammar/dialogue changes in all chapters - Connecting using the In-game Client should now work better - Connecting to alternative server is now fixed - Change datastorage key names to `slot_team_keyname` - Items needed to progress are now highlighted - Made Dark Candy/Darker Candy have proper stats/descriptions in their respective chapters ### Chapter 1 - Fixed Chapter 1 giving you empty weapon slots if you choose to have starting gear ### Chapter 2 - Fixed the KeyGen 2 lock appearing every time you re-enter the room - Made the npc telling you to fight Spamton NEO actually appear ### Chapter 3 - Doing 1225 on the Ball Machine doesn't steal all of your points, just 1225 of them - Added an NPC to skip Doom Board - Making it to the end of the Credits no longer crashes the game ### Chapter 4 - Skipping Dark Sanctuary now just sends the Jackenstein Gift and Sheetmusic locations - Made the warp to fight Hammer of Justice better (sorry starwalker....) - Returning to Castle Town at the end of Chapter 4 no longer has barriers

entry.title: budokai_tenkaichi2 v0.3.0
entry.content: Z-Support Items are in the pool, disable giants flag as well as death link

entry.title: Dead Cells v0.1.4
entry.content:
Gameplay Changes: - Colorless shop price lowered (400 -> 100) - Every outfit now costs 50 (except cultist) - The number of charges you gain with the hunter grenade is now the number of active BSC + 1 - Added offline synchronization. If you are playing and you forgot to connect, the locations you checked will be sent when you are connected to the server - As a lot of people play on apworld versions incompatible with the mod version (ending in a crash when talking to the collector after receiving specific items), I will write from now on in the release notes which version it is compatible with, and now the apworld version is displayed in-game when connecting. The color code is: - Red: too old and will cause crashes - Green: compatible - Orange: unknown as the apworld comes from a later release than the mod
Bug Fixes: - AP versions of Dead Man's Bag and Residual Cells were overriding the vanilla ones when given once - Crash upon entering Boss Rush - Boss Defeats not being sent (a flag help for Universal Tracker users)
Apworld Changes by Rayze: - Fixed Cursed Biome rules crashing generation if Bad Seed/Castlevania DLCs disabled - Archipelago.json wasnt actually in the apworld folder, moved it there and it it no longer throws the generation disclaimer - Fixed Parting Gift in the Graveyard missing Ram Rune rule - Added a Location Group "Problem Heads" for the Head Checks that currently cause an accessibility warning on generation - Renamed BossRushUnlock and added it to prefill to its associated Location
Compatible with apworld 0.1.4

entry.title: Ship of Harkinian v1.3.0
entry.content:
The team has been hard at work over the last couple of months to put this release together.
This release features a few frequently requested features and a pretty major under the hood change!
## Changes - Our client is now based on Ship of Harkinian 9.2.3, fixing several in-game tracker inconsistencies and introduces a "Allow background inputs" toggle among all other new built-in Ship features. - Added static hints with clarity options, no more wondering what a merchant has for sale or or if killing those gold skultullas is worth it. - Added Gossip stone hints. - Added a fully featured hint panel to the client. - Ported all logic to the rule builder format, allowing Universal tracker to explain why you can or can't collect certain checks. - Added more starting item options. - Added Medallion locked trial options. - Added Trial count options. - Added Damage and Trap link toggles. - Added Automatic map switching in poptracker. - Fixes and updates to Item classifications - Fixes and updates to Item and Location groupings. - Improved deathlink handling. - A ton of bugfixes.
# Full Change log - Updated client to Ship of Harkinian 9.2.3 - Added the ability to launch the Ship of Harkinian client form your room's web page, automatically populating the connection data fields. - Added Starting Item options for the following items: - Kokiri Sword. - Deku Shield. - Master Sword. - Ocarinas. - Nuts. - Sticks. - Songs. - Added different options for starting items in links pocket. - Added Starting hearts option. - Added medallion locked trials and Required trials count option, - Added static hints with clarity options. - Added gossip stone hints. - Added a hint panel to the Ship of Harkinian client which features. - Automatic creation of hints on clear static hint dialogue. - Updating hint relevance for items you can receive. - Sorting. - Manually requesting hints with a fuzzy searching for relevant items. - Improved Trap randomization. - Added automatic map switching to the poptracker pack. - Added location and item groups for all items. - These are used for creating ambiguous hints, hints that can refer to multiple items or locations. - Internal logic has been fully switched over to the rule builder. - Added Damage and Trap link. - Fixed deathlink getting send out multiple times. - Fixed Broken item references with golden skultullas. - Made the Archipelago Connected label automatically fade out after you've been connected for a while. - Fixed bug where "Song from Ocarina of Time" and "Sheik in ice cavern" checks got sent out erroneously when their related "Ocarina of time Item" and "Ice cavern Iron Boots Chest" checks were collected remotely while offline during asynch multiworlds. - Added Randomization of seeded client features - Local Enemy Randomizer and Randomized Mirror mode should not be the same across multiworlds anymore - Updated Item classifications. - Stopped requesting location scouts on every connection, now only requesting them on save file creation. - Added a whole bunch of unit test. - Fixed Poe collector giving you a bottle when the check has already been collected remotely. - Fixed accidental goaling a second time when switching to a different slot after beating the game. - Incoming ice traps now have randomized models now.
# Known Issues - There are some issues with the client getting stuck "loading data" during save file creation. We are currently unsure which settings might cause this issue. If you run into this problem please send us your yaml file and a copy of the generated multiworld so we can diagnose the issue - There is a generation issue when using Item links. This issue will be fixed in new version down the line. - The Hint panel does not correctly display the names of the hinted items when playing with multiple different games in the same multiworld - In game Static Hints cannot find the names of locations for games with really high internal id numbers such as with paper mario. - When creating a new save file for a slot that already has some playtime on it may not always correctly synch all items that were already checked.

entry.title: Mini Metro v0.2.0a0
entry.content:
Recent Changes - Custom Shard Counts or pre-calculated shard count up to player choice - Now it's progressive map shard that goes towards a new map in a queue - Lines are now unlocked one by one - Early logic is now implemented better. I hope. - a new stylized skip button
Bug Fixes - Fixed UI issues on level-up - Fixed Week progression checks being out of sync with weeks - Fixed sending death link on leaving a map / disconnecting - Fixed checks sometimes not processing.

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.6.0
entry.content:
## Installation
1. Download `dread.apworld` (below) and drop it into your Archipelago install's `custom_worlds/` directory. 2. Generate a multiworld using `Metroid Dread` as the game. 3. Launch the **Dread Client** from Archipelago's Launcher (or open a `.dreadap` file). The window includes an AP server address bar, a **"Dread"** tab (live status + log), and a top-bar **Switch-status pill** for pointing the client at your Switch or Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use `/dread_connect <ip>` in the command bar). 4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched RomFS — see the [first-time setup walkthrough](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/docs/first-time-setup.md) for the click-by-click guide.
See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md) for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).
## What's Changed * Handle non-interpreter dreadvania_python without crashing auto-patch by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/128
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.14.0...v0.14.1

entry.title: Halo The Master Chief Collection v1.1.1
entry.content: # Bug Fixes - removed unnecessary debug window when starting game - Missions will be correctly locked when the halo 1 engine moves or shuts down

entry.title: Wargroove 2 v1.1.7
entry.content: # Features - New map by KoiiBlitz: Wargroove Warriors - Includes code for item names (WARNING: ITEM NAMES NOT FINAL) # Bugfixes - Fixes Skipped maps appearing when they shouldn't

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.6.0
entry.content:
## Installation
1. Download `dread.apworld` (below) and drop it into your Archipelago install's `custom_worlds/` directory. 2. Generate a multiworld using `Metroid Dread` as the game. 3. Launch the **Dread Client** from Archipelago's Launcher (or open a `.dreadap` file). The window includes an AP server address bar, a **"Dread"** tab (live status + log), and a top-bar **Switch-status pill** for pointing the client at your Switch or Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use `/dread_connect <ip>` in the command bar). 4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched RomFS — see the [first-time setup walkthrough](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/docs/first-time-setup.md) for the click-by-click guide.
See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md) for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).
## What's Changed * Fix 0/0 power bombs when start-location randomizer grants Power Bomb by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/129
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.14.1...v0.14.2

entry.title: Feeding Frenzy 2 v0.5
entry.content:
Movement rando, level rando, and borderless fullscreen!
## What's new: * Added /fullscreen command to client that sets the application to borderless fullscreen * Added 'Dash' and 'Suck' randomization items * Notably this also affects the ability to clear poison since it blocks left/right clicking * Level randomization added with the 'level_shuffle' YAML option

entry.title: Pikuniku v0.1.0
entry.content:
The very first release!
[Game Information](https://github.com/Jeffdev-Archipelago-Implementations/Archipelago-Piku/blob/main/worlds/pikuniku/docs/en_Pikuniku.md) [Setup Guide](https://github.com/Jeffdev-Archipelago-Implementations/Archipelago-Piku/blob/main/worlds/pikuniku/docs/setup_en.md) [Client Mod](https://github.com/Jeffdev-Archipelago-Implementations/PikuAPMod/releases/latest)

entry.title: Pikuniku v0.2.0
entry.content: - [Client] Fixed bug where the apple checks wouldn't send at all - [APWorld] Fixed logic issues with apples and some coins - [APWorld/Client] Reshuffled some IDs to fix some coin checks not sending properly - [Client] Bundled client with the correct websocket-sharp and c-wspp.dll so all releases will be able to connect to archipelago.gg properly

entry.title: Pikuniku v0.3.0
entry.content: - [APWorld] Adjusted logic for A Video Game to be after A Detonator - [APWorld] Moved X-Ray Goggles to the same logical tier as Sunglasses as they are interchangeable - [APWorld] Adjusted logic for Forest Dancing Bug to be after El Bunko access - [APWorld/Client] Renamed the apple checks to Apple 1/2/3, and adjust how they work in the client. Grabbing any apple will get you the first check, then the second one for the second, then the third one for the third. - [Client] Added a force save after the items go through the item queue when connecting to a game, to prevent losing items upon leaving and re-joining the game - [Client] Added an F2 keybind to skip the intro and take you straight to the mountain start. - [Client] Change the F1 unstuck keybind to take you to the beginning of the mines, if you are in the detonator section of the mines, to help unstuck you. - [Client] Added a tip message in the intro mentioning the F1 and F2 keybinds

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.0.8
entry.content:
Fixes have been made to sm64ex, but it should be backwards and forward-compatible going back to 0.0.6
.apworld updates: - Lethal Lava Land 1-Up location names have been fixed and adjusted. - Logic fixes in BITFS, WDW, WF, TTC, WMOTR, BITDW, CCM, WMOTR, TTM, RR, BOB
sm64ex fork updates: - 1-Up blocks once again spawn 1-Ups, which must be collected to register their checks. - Bookend enemies should drop blue coins when they kamikaze if no_despawns is enabled. - Yoshi no longer "upgrades" your Triple Jump. - Checks will not be sent during the demos. - A patch file is included which hopefully fixes whatever is wrong with the Better Camera in the Bowser fight arenas.

entry.title: budokai_tenkaichi2 v0.3.1
entry.content: UT Support Implemented

entry.title: Dwarf Fortress v1.1.2
entry.content:
## Fixes
- **DF v50 check detection**: several checks relied on job_type/field names that no longer exist on DFHack 53.14 (DF v50), so they silently never fired: - Brewing and tanning are `CustomReactions`, not job types — now detected by reaction name, fixing **First Brew Complete**, **First Leather Tanned**, and the three Crafting Leather checks. - **First Trap Built** now matches the actual cage/stone/weapon trap-arming jobs instead of a non-existent `ConstructTrap` type. - **Pumped Water/Magma** compared against the wrong enum value and could never register Water; fixed, and hand-cranked pumps are no longer excluded. - **Sold an Artifact** now also handles DF v50's `item` pointer (previously only `item_id`). - **First Eggs Hatched** disabled for now — no reliable hatch signal exists on v50. - **Sold an Artifact false-fired on world load**: the check scanned every historical artifact in the world instead of just ones present in your fort, so it could trip the instant a save loaded. Now tracks only artifacts actually present in your fort and fires when one of those goes missing. - **Sold an Artifact false-fired on raids**: sending a squad out with an artifact equipped registered as a "sale" once they returned. Now only fires when an artifact is confirmed trader-owned and then departs — raids, theft, and destruction no longer count. - **Treasury wealth undercounted stockpiled valuables**: coins and gems stored in bins, bags, or coffers were excluded by an overly broad "in inventory" check. They now count toward treasury wealth. - **Craftsanity rule fixes**: corrected crafting-permit/material logic for the "Crafts" item category (wood/stone, glass, and metal crafts were sharing one incorrect rule). - **World gen preset**: rewritten with the complete parameter set; the previous preset was missing parameters.
## Improvements
- **Milestone ladder prerequisites**: tiered milestones (mining depth, mining tiles, farming, and the cavern ladder) now require the previous tier to be reachable first, so logic can no longer hand out a high tier before earlier ones. - **Options page reorganized**: the WebHost options/YAML page now groups settings into collapsible sections (Goal Settings, Death Link, Craftsanity, Item & Location Options), leaving only the high-level options on the main page. Verified via a full local generation run with differing per-slot craftsanity/permit settings that the DataPackage checksum stays stable.
## Other
- Added two hidden commands

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.6
entry.content:
Fixed assorted incorrect internal unit names. Added filler blacklist to yaml
New [submods](https://github.com/jordansds/TWW3-Recruit-Without-Buildings/releases) available if you want to recruit units without buildings.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.10.5...v0.10.6

entry.title: Rogue Legacy 2 v0.1.0
entry.content:
**Note: Only the game mod files (RL2Archipelago.zip) need to be replaced when updating to this version. If you already have v1.1.1 you can keep your .apworld**
### Improvements and cleanup
- The debug hotkeys (7- set boss clear flags, 8- give gold, 9- heal player, 0- reveal map) are now disabled by default. They can still be enabled in the AP settings screen, but they are not intended to be used during a real run. - Added descriptions for the toggles in the AP settings screen - Major improvements in how the mod handles a temporary disconnect from the AP server. Now the game should auto re-connect you when the server becomes available again. - The game will also show a notification to alert the player that they are disconnected - Progress can still be made while disconnected and it is saved even through the game being closed. It will re-sync with the server upon the next successful connection
### Bugfixes
- There was a rare issue where players would be unable to close a settings menu and after restarting their game would lose their progress. This has been fixed along with adding more robust save management so progress should not be lost anymore.

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.7.post2
entry.content:
Fixed more broken units. Renamed 2 Norsca techs that clashed. Fixed RitualSanity Generation failure.
New [submods](https://github.com/jordansds/TWW3-Recruit-Without-Buildings/releases) available if you want to recruit units without buildings.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.10.6...v0.10.7

entry.title: kirby_squeak_squad v0.0.7
entry.content: - Major fix to chest count overflow causing crashes - the fix makes it harder to track in game chests so... - Added an in-game overlay tracker that can be activated with 'T' key - Support for Universal Tracker

entry.title: ChecksMate v0.3.2
entry.content:
Fewer crashes. Big pawns.
- Feature: Added fairy_chess_pawn_upgrades with pawn-sergeant generation support in Off, Pool, and Max modes. - Technical: Move hashes are now 64 bit. - This immediately allows us to populate a higher limit on distinct pieces, and may allow a wider variety of Directions among piece types. - Enables (non-generative) AI search, opening-book, killer/countermove, and transposition. - Note: Certain early crashes are to do with exploring unregistered Directions (e.g. a knight is 2,1 and 1,2; no piece moves 5,3). - Feature?: Improved crash and diagnostic reporting. - Failure text includes more board, history, and move context. - Centralized crash formatting. - Added GUI recoverable diagnostics to avoid ending certain sessions. - Bug fix: Hardened move generation and core make/unmake. - Previously could corrupt board state, or use garbage values due to an uninitialized MoveList cursor state. - Added move-generation context stack tracing and stronger MoveList reset/restart/iteration contracts. - Improved partial-make rollback. - Technical: Cleaned up client piece paths, item handling, location tracking, pawn setup/distribution, and mixed en-passant handling. - Extracted item randomization out of the handler, which is now more of a coordinator. - Technical: Added test coverage for fuzzed positions, crash repros, MoveList contracts, make/unmake safety, hash stability, and diagnostic formatting.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/chesslogic/chessv/compare/v0.3.1...v0.3.2

entry.title: budokai_tenkaichi2 v0.3.2
entry.content: Added Cutscene Skip Option

entry.title: Spirit Island v0.1.4
entry.content:
## V0.1.4
### Client - Refresh goals on connect (actually already published in hotfix) - Fix initial load freezing game - Fix scouting freezing game - Fix goal check freezing game - Fix increments incorrectly loading
### APworld - Fixed item classification for filler items - Add description for element items - Automate names based on in-game files (instead of wiki) Fixes name for: - _Call on Midnight's Dreams_ - _Flash-fires_ - _Regrow From Roots_ - _Dark Skies Loose A Stinging Rain_ - _Foundations Sink Into Mud_ - _Mark Territory With Scars and Teeth_
Fixes expansion for _Roiling Bog and Snagging Thorn_
---
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Wouter17/Spirit-Archipelago/compare/0.1.3-hf1...0.1.4

entry.title: Hammerwatch v4.1.1
entry.content:
This update contains documentation updates, primarily adding some FAQs. Updating to this version is not important as there are no gameplay differences between this version and 4.1
Get the latest client release here: https://github.com/Parcosmic/HammerwatchAPMod/releases
If you're new or looking for some more information check out the links below: Setup guide: https://github.com/Parcosmic/Hammerwatch-Archipelago/blob/dev/worlds/hammerwatch/docs/setup_en.md Info page: https://github.com/Parcosmic/Hammerwatch-Archipelago/blob/dev/worlds/hammerwatch/docs/en_Hammerwatch.md

entry.title: Pokemon BW Starters Rando Plugin v1.1.0
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Fix compatibility with main 0.3.31 - Added weighting to all options
### Compatibility Compatible with main v0.3.31 (latest as of writing), future versions will probably be compatible as well until starter rando is implemented in main.

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.31
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Reworked plugins system and added capabilities to modify world generation - Adding the hooks `generate_early`, `generate_encounters`, `create_regions`, `create_items`, `write_patch` - However, this breaks old plugins - Slightly changed the `Reusable TMs` choice `yes` to `yes_please` - Old yamls will still work and quietly fix the name change - Added an lz11 decompress algorithm - Fixed the Master Ball seller in N's Castle
### Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.27 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT

entry.title: witchspringrap v0.2.0
entry.content:
## 0.2.0 ### AI Disclaimer; Very reluctantly, this update was made with the help of AI. I do not plan to make this the norm, and I sat on this for a while if I even use this but there was just so much added and working that it would've been dumb not to use it. Further elaboration in discord
A large update over 0.1.3 — full chapter coverage, cross-platform/save reliability, Universal Tracker support, many new checks, and a big pass of progression-logic fixes.
> **⚠️ Upgrade notes (read before updating)** > - **Bridge data moved out of `%LOCALAPPDATA%`** into your game install folder. The client now asks for (or you set in `host.yaml`) your **WitchSpring R install path** on first use. See the README. > - **Generate fresh seeds** with 0.2.0 — seeds made on 0.1.3 won't have the new checks or logic.
### Cross-platform & save reliability - Bridge files now live in the **game install folder** (`<game>/Archipelago/`) instead of `%LOCALAPPDATA%`, so the mod works under **Steam Deck / Proton / macOS**. - **Per-seed session folders** keep multiple seeds/saves cleanly separated — items and checks from one seed can never bleed into another. - **Crash / Alt-F4 resilience:** items not yet written to your save are re-delivered on reload (save-marker reconcile); the delivery queue retries then skips a bad item instead of stalling; writes are atomic. - **Items now deliver everywhere in the game.** The "safe to deliver" scene list previously only covered early areas, so items received in later chapters silently didn't arrive — it now covers the whole game (~200 scenes).
### Universal Tracker - Added **Universal Tracker support** (generates without a yaml, reads slot data).
### World coverage & goals - Playable range expanded; still largely untested beyond Chapter 3 but should function through Chapter 9. - New regions: **RedBeard's Cave, Kanna's House, Luna's House, Ice Cave, Frozen Altar**. - Removed the phantom "Chapter 8" (the game goes 7 → 9); the chapter-9 goal is now reachable.
### New location checks - Around **two dozen new checks** across the game: event rewards (weapon-upgrade materials, key story items, etc.), **blessing checks** (Arua, Aimhard, Elysion, Durok), and **battle-reward checks** (Boar Captain, Shipwreck Cabin Key). - Blessings are now sendable via a new in-game hook (they're granted differently from normal items, so they were previously unsendable). - Missable / one-time checks are marked so the generator never hides required progression behind them.
### Progression-logic fixes - **Mind Control Circle** is back in the pool and properly gates the content that needs it (Swamp, South Island, the Fire Cave branch, weapon-upgrade handout, and one entrance chest). - **Reaching Chapter 2** now correctly requires the Fire Magic Spellbook **and** the Mind Control Circle; the Fire Spellbook itself sits behind Mind Control. - **South Island** access now requires the Fire Magic Spellbook (you pass Black Joe on the way), so it can't be stranded behind that gate. - **Reaching Chapter 3** now requires actually being able to reach the Lalaque Mine (Boar Captain's Tooth), not just holding the Mine Key. - **Reaching Chapter 6** now requires the Prototype Steam Engine. - **Ice Magic Spellbook** gates the Ice Cave and Durok Temple. - **Laoba Mountain** (Warrior Camp) is available earlier — as soon as you've beaten the Boar Captain — instead of being locked to Chapter 3. - Shipwreck progression modeled properly (Hold Key → Armory/Cabin Key → boss → Aimhard). - Swim-only spots (a South Island islet, the Royal Pudding fight) now require the Aged Lalaque Berry (the swimming-pet item) so they aren't logically required before you can reach them. - Numerous smaller rule corrections and a fixed Boar-Captain's-Tooth rule typo.
### Item pool - **Removed craftable spell circles that soft-lock their quest** if received early (4-Orb Flame, 4-Pillar Ice) and the 3-Orb you already start with. - Removed redundant / trap / non-functional items from the pool (e.g. Shipwreck Cannonball, Great Key, Matt's Garden Passage Key, a duplicate Red Gem, the phantom Chapter 8). - Reclassified the Aged Lalaque Berry to progression (it now gates swim content) and Frozen Heart to filler.
### Plugin / quality - New in-game **event blockers** (CheckSwitch hook) that gate story events safely without hard-locking. - Cleaned up logging: routine per-event chatter is now hidden/debug-level, so the BepInEx console stays quiet unless something actually goes wrong.

entry.title: YARG v0.0.19
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
New: - Support for the Luge 01 Setlist
## What's Changed * Added Luge 01 Pack by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/42
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.18...0.0.19

entry.title: Halo The Master Chief Collection v1.1.2
entry.content:
# What's New - different ending missions other than the maw are now possible, this can be configured through a new option in the YAML - Windows Store Support
# other fixes - added manifest file to apworld - switched logic to rule builder

entry.title: Dark Cloud 1 v0.5.0
entry.content:
# Dark Cloud 1 AP Rando v0.5.6
## Client Changes - Client now waits for the dungeon to be fully initialized before modifying atla info to avoid unlikely issue - Correctly unlock map access to DHC when unlocking the final dungeon - Autobuild: Fixed placement issues if mushroom/Couscous house received before related Earth piece - Autobuild: Tweak to how buildings are placed to lead to a little less jitter for current town
No .apworld changes made; works with older worlds/saves
